answer: \boxed{Todd is disoriented because his entire existence has been shaped by rigid military conditioning, where he was trained to obey orders without question, suppress emotions, and view the world through a lens of violence and hierarchy. The peaceful, conflict-free life of the Arcadia colonists—filled with love, fearlessness, and emotional vulnerability—conflicts with his ingrained instincts, leaving him unable to adapt or understand their values. His trauma from past killings and the sudden exposure to civilian emotions trigger flashbacks and irrational reactions, further unraveling his conditioned detachment.}
